concept: Calm, clean, and authoritative financial news platform with a deep obsidian base and muted gold accents. The design prioritizes readability, data clarity, and a premium 'Old Money Tech' aesthetic over flashy, neon web3 styles.

setup_commands: Wait for main agent to implement Google Fonts import for Cabinet Grotesk, Manrope, and JetBrains Mono

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing (p-8, p-12) for large sections to feel premium. Dense, crisp spacing for numerical data and tickers.

grid_patterns.hero_news: Bento grid (TETRIS style). 1 dominant hero card spanning 2 columns/rows, 2 smaller supporting cards. Base grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6.
grid_patterns.dashboard: Control Room grid. Dense grids (gap-4 or gap-6), strict borders, cardless sharp edges.

spacing_and_layout.borders: 1px solid #232B3E for cards. Very subtle, avoiding heavy drop shadows. Focus on crisp 'Neumorphism tactile' or 'Grid Borders' tech look.

surfaces_and_effects.header: Crystal Glassmorphism. bg-[#0A0D14]/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-[#232B3E]. Must be sticky (z-50).
surfaces_and_effects.ticker: Solid background bg-[#121620] border-b border-[#232B3E] py-2 text-sm. Use 'react-fast-marquee' for smooth, slow, continuous scrolling.
surfaces_and_effects.cards: Flat solid background bg-[#121620] border border-[#232B3E] rounded-lg. On hover: border-[#D4AF37]/50 and slight -translate-y-1 transition.
surfaces_and_effects.images: Hero images must have a gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-t from-[#0A0D14] via-[#0A0D14]/50 to-transparent) to ensure text contrast.

components_strategy.public_site: Pure HTML/Tailwind for marketing/news layout. Create raw divs to ensure custom layouts and overlap.
components_strategy.admin_cms: Shadcn UI (Tables, Dialogs, Select, Forms, Tabs) but heavily customized to match the dark theme and gold accents.
components_strategy.forms: Shadcn UI Form, Input, Select for Contact and Search.
components_strategy.buttons: Primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-black hover:bg-[#C39F2F]. Secondary: border border-[#D4AF37] text-[#D4AF37] hover:bg-[#D4AF37]/10.
components_strategy.icons: lucide-react for standard icons, optionally @phosphor-icons/react for more premium duotone look.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over images uses text-shadow or gradient scrims. APCA compliant. Gold accent must be used specifically on dark backgrounds for minimum 4.5:1 ratio.
accessibility.interactive: All buttons/links must have hover and focus rings (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#D4AF37] focus:outline-none).
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements must include data-testid attributes.

hero_finance_bg.description: Abstract dark and calm financial market background with subtle gold glow

crypto_blocks_gold.description: Abstract representation of blockchain data blocks with gold lines

bitcoin_gold_dark.description: Golden bitcoin coin on dark obsidian surface

stock_chart_phone.description: Close up of cell phone with stock chart

bitcoin_logo_dark.description: Shiny bitcoin logo on black background
